description: Analytical potential-flow visualization. Traces streamlines around a 3D body and renders them coloured by local speed.

bin.description: Solve a flow case and dump JSON to stdout

iframe_commands.name: body
iframe_commands.description: Switch built-in body shape and re-solve

iframe_commands.name: stl
iframe_commands.description: Load an STL file from disk; bounding ellipsoid drives the flow approximation

iframe_commands.name: y-offset
iframe_commands.description: Body-relative Y offset of the streamline sheet (-2 to +2). Slides existing streamlines along the axis without re-seeding more rows.

iframe_commands.name: radius
iframe_commands.description: Tube radius multiplier (0.3–3.0); 1 = auto-sized to body

iframe_commands.name: wake
iframe_commands.description: Wake/turbulence amplitude (0–1.5). 0 = clean potential flow; higher values inject curl-noise vortex shedding behind the body and tint streamlines red where strongest.

iframe_commands.name: shading
iframe_commands.description: Recolour body surface: off (matte), pressure (Cp via jet LUT, red=stagnation/blue=accelerated), friction (|v|/U∞)

iframe_commands.name: solve
iframe_commands.description: Re-run the solver with current settings

iframe_commands.name: rotate
iframe_commands.description: Toggle slow auto-rotation of the camera
